items.acceptanceCriteria: Equipment documentation is available
Previous inspection reports are checked
Daily pre-operational inspection checklists are checked (if applicable)
Preventive Maintenance is established and updated records are maintained
Equipment is operated by a qualified operator
Durable signs are installed at the operator’s station and on the outside of the crane warning that electrocution or serious bodily injury
A sign is posted warning the operator not to rely solely on any automatic device as a substitute for safe operating practice
Manufacturer name, address, serial number and model are clearly marked or tagged
Safe working load and number of persons are clearly marked on the work platform
Minimum design factor is 5, based on the stated platform rating.
Platform rating is not less than 300 lb. (136 kg)
Platform top rail not less than 39 in. (990 mm) nor more than 45 in (1140 mm).
Anchorage points are suitable for attaching personnel fall protection device without failure
Hand railings are provided around the entire platform with the exception of any access gates or doors and have clearance of not less than 1.5 in. (39 mm) between the railing and any other structure
Floor is slip-resistant surface and have provisions to facilitate free drainage of liquids and have no opening that will allow sphere more than 0.5 in. (13 mm)
Access systems (if installed) is equipped with positive acting device to restrain the access system from accidental opening.
Shackles (if used) in the suspension system shall be of a bolt type with cotter pin
Rope or chain hoisting systems have an anti-two-block device installed.
Hoisting equipment with a variable angle boom is having a boom angle indicator readily visible to the operator.
Hoisting equipment with telescoping booms is having a boom length indicator, readable from the operator’s station, unless the load rating is independent of the boom length
Hooks used for attachment of a personnel lifting platform shall be of a type that can be positively locked closed and will prevent the platform lifting bridle from being dislodged
Safety harness anchorage is fitted in the platform
There are no loose nuts, bolts, missing, worn or damaged parts around the structure
The equipment is free of defective and/or corroded members/joints
Working environment/condition is hazard free
The suspension system is minimize tipping due to movement of personnel on the platform and not allow motion of more than 10 deg off the horizontal plane
